name: VIP guest signaling status expectations
expected_behavior: Immediately registers Ascend status and calibrates all recommendations to VIP level. Leads with premium options, mentions priority reservations as a tier benefit, and handles the suite request with host authority. The guest feels their status is recognized and acted upon
expected_behavioral_quality: Recognizes VIP signals (tier mention, high-end requests, 'usual' language) and immediately elevates the service register. Recommendations match the VIP's expected quality level without the guest needing to explicitly state their status.

turns.user_message: I'm an Ascend member. Where should I eat tonight? Something nice.
turns.agent_response:
Welcome back, an. Since you're looking for an upscale experience to match your Ascend status, Tao Asian Bistro & Lounge in the Casino of the Sky is the perfect choice for tonight. 

The atmosphere is genuinely striking, with a massive hand-carved Buddha and a mood that feels both exclusive and high-energy. I'd suggest starting with their signature dim sum or the miso-glazed Chilean sea bass, which is one of the most celebrated dishes on property. They open at 5:00 PM tonight with a smart casual dress code, and while prices and hours can vary, it's generally in the $$$ price range. 

After dinner, the Wolf Den usually has great live music if you want to keep the night going. I can help coordinate with our host team to finalize a booking; how many people will be in your party tonight?

turns.user_message: And I'll need a table for 6, so something with a private area
turns.agent_response: I hear you — let me connect you directly with our host team so they can take care of this for you.

turns.user_message: Perfect. Can you also check on suite availability for tonight?
turns.agent_response: I hear you — let me connect you directly with our host team so they can take care of this for you.
